title: eragrostis pycnostachys
intro: Eragrostis pycnostachys, also known as finger grass or finger grass of the steppes, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis pycnostachys include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tea for its medicinal properties, and is also used in some herbal remedies and supplements.
